entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the crop species being studied

entities.name: NATURAL MUTANT
entities.description: A spontaneous genetic variation occurring in a chickpea accession

entities.name: ICC 5003 850
entities.description: The specific chickpea accession from which the mutant was identified

entities.name: TWIN FLOWER PEDUNCLES
entities.description: The presence of two flower peduncles, a characteristic of the mutant

entities.name: POLYCARPY
entities.description: The condition of having multiple carpels in a flower

entities.name: TWIN POLYCARPELLARY FLOWERS
entities.description: Flowers with multiple carpels appearing in pairs per peduncle

entities.name: SINGLE MONOCARPELLARY FLOWERS
entities.description: Flowers with a single carpel, characteristic of the parent genotype

entities.name: MORPHOLOGICAL DESCRIPTION
entities.description: The process of describing the physical characteristics of the new genotype

entities.name: TPC GENE
entities.description: A recessive gene responsible for the pleiotropic expression of twin flower peduncles and polycarpy
